commands.review_summary:
The branch restricts personal publisher membership management and adjusts publisher/package authorization so personal publishers rely on `linkedUserId` while org publishers continue to use memberships.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows a high-confidence path: create a stale `publisherMembers` row on a `kind: "user"` publisher and the remaining skill destination and package owner-access helpers still accept that row.
commands.review_followup: Human follow-up is needed because this is a security-sensitive authorization PR with remaining source-level boundary gaps and missing real behavior proof.

target.title: fix: restrict membership management to org publishers
target.body:
## Summary

Keeps personal publishers as identity aliases instead of collaborative org-like publishers.

## What changed

- Member add/update flows remain restricted to org publishers.
- Personal publisher authority now comes only from `linkedUserId === actorUserId`.
- Stale personal-publisher membership rows no longer authorize publish target resolution.
- Org publisher membership still authorizes org publishing normally.
- Existing stale personal membership rows can remain for cleanup; they no longer grant authority.

## Public behavior

Publishing or managing through a personal publisher now requires that the personal publisher is linked to the acting user. A stale membership row cannot authorize a different user's personal publisher.

Org publisher membership remains valid for org-owned publishing.

## Behavior proof

Focused terminal proof from publisher resolution and package authorization:

```text
$ vitest run convex/publishers.test.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts --reporter verbose --testNamePattern "another personal publisher through a stale membership|org publisher memberships valid|stale personal-publisher memberships|extra memberships on personal publishers|personal publisher roles"

✓ convex/packages.public.test.ts > packages public queries > rejects user package transfers through stale personal-publisher memberships
✓ convex/publishers.test.ts > publishers membership controls > does not resolve another personal publisher through a stale membership
✓ convex/publishers.test.ts > publishers membership controls > keeps org publisher memberships valid for publish target resolution
✓ convex/publishers.test.ts > publisher-owned resource authorization > does not honor extra memberships on personal publishers
✓ convex/publishers.test.ts > publisher-owned resource authorization > does not authorize personal publisher roles for non-linked members

Test Files  2 passed (2)
Tests  5 passed | 154 skipped (159)
```

Full focused suite also passed:

```text
$ bun run test convex/publishers.test.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts convex/httpApiV1.handlers.test.ts
Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests       356 passed (356)
```

## Validation

```text
$ bun run ci:static
passed
```

```text
$ bun run ci:unit
Test Files  204 passed (204)
Tests       1994 passed (1994)
Statements  85.98%
Branches    75.17%
Functions   86.37%
Lines        89.48%
```

```text
$ bun run ci:types-build
tsc, package typechecks, clawhub-mod typecheck, Vite build, and Nitro build passed.
```
